title: Count Unique Characters of All Substrings of a Given String
titleCn: 统计子串中的唯一字符

testcases.input: s = "ABC" Output: 10 Explanation: All possible substrings are: "A","B","C","AB","BC" and "ABC". Every substring is composed with only unique letters. Sum of lengths of all substring is 1 + 1 + 1 + 2 + 2 + 3 = 10
testcases.expectedOutput: 10 Explanation: All possible substrings are: "A","B","C","AB","BC" and "ABC". Every substring is composed with only unique letters. Sum of lengths of all substring is 1 + 1 + 1 + 2 + 2 + 3 = 10
